pi_items.source: export_result.sh SQL query looking for exact page title 'Summer Explorer Campaign'.
verifier.py directly checks for the exact text 'Explore the Wild' in the WordPress page content.
setup_task.sh downloads the image as 'hero_mountain.jpg', and export_result.sh searches wp-content/uploads for files matching '*hero_mountain*'.
setup_task.sh creates the 'Travel' category, and verifier.py verifies that the query loop block filters posts by the ID of the 'Travel' category.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a new page titled 'Summer Explorer Campaign' that includes a Cover block with the hero text 'Explore the Wild' over the 'hero_mountain.jpg' image (a real public domain photograph of Mount Everest). The page must also contain a Query Loop block set to filter and display only posts from the 'Travel' category, and the page must be set as the static front page.
